steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The sentence says the artist can do something with her work "more broadly" because of Indigenous Photograph’s reach, and the next sentence explains that photography editors worldwide can search the site for Indigenous photographers. The blank needs a word meaning share or publicize — something an expanded platform enables.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
Substitute each word and test it against the passage:
  • Choice A — 'empty': Empty means to remove contents from something — "empty her work more broadly" is nonsensical in this context. ✗
  • Choice B — 'promote': Promote means to publicize and raise awareness — editors worldwide finding her through the organization’s reach is exactly promoting her work to a broader audience. ✓
  • Choice C — 'alter': Alter means to change or modify — the passage is about visibility and reach, not changing the work itself. ✗
  • Choice D — 'discover': Discover means to find something for the first time — she already knows her own work; the organization helps others find it, not her. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
